title: Immersive Portals Reloaded
description: An Immersive Portals modpack for the latest (possible) versions of Minecraft.
body:
(Sorry for being outdated) Have you been looking for an Immersive Portals Modpack for 1.20.4 but could never find one? Then you came to the right place! This modpack includes Immersive Portals, Pehkui, Gravity Changer, and more! In the future, I will add versions 1.21 and over. (If there's a gravity mod for later versions.)
    With this Modpack, you can change your gravity; For example, flip upside down and walk on the ceiling. You can use Immersive Portals with gravity changing to make you flip your gravity with the portals. You can make mind-bending stuff like making a cube with rooms with different things on each side that should overlap but don't. Another thing you can do is make an infinite maze that you can walk through for thousands of years and will never get out. Another thing that you can do is troll your friends and make them go through a giant escape room made with portals. I hope you like this modpack because I spent a while making it. Also, a big shout out to volzhukbnyy (on Curseforge) for inspiring me to make this modpack. (:
